name: consulting
description: Eight management-consulting and digital-strategy advisors covering the full engagement lifecycle, grounded in canonical sources: Block's Flawless Consulting, Kubr's Management Consulting, Burtonshaw-Gunn's Essential Tools, Mabee's Consulting Discipline, Robbins & Judge's Essentials of OB, Voss's Never Split the Difference, and Dixon & Adamson's Challenger Sale. Four ready-to-use templates: Engagement Scoping, Negotiation Prep, Challenger Sale Pursuit, Change Readiness & Discovery. Specialists cover management consulting, digital strategy, change management, proposals, SOW risk, sales/BD, negotiation, and client humanization. Innovation work moved to the dedicated `innovation` plugin (formerly consulting-innovation-strategist); DT books shared via cross-reference.
